hero.headline: AI-Powered Legal Compliance Auditing
hero.subheadline: Identify procedural defects, rights violations, and compliance failures across 14 specialized domains.

audit.title: Compliance Audit
audit.upload_hint: PDF, DOCX, or plain text — court orders, agency correspondence, police reports, medical evaluations, CPS determinations

results.title: Audit Findings
results.disclaimer: This analysis is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal advice. Consult a qualified attorney for legal determinations.

about.title: About
about.description: Hartmann Legal Analytics provides AI-powered compliance auditing across legal, regulatory, and institutional domains. Built on the VERNEN™ analysis engine, the platform identifies procedural defects, rights violations, and compliance failures that manual review often misses.
about.creator: Created by Michael Vernen Thomas Hartmann
about.methodology_desc: Every document is audited against the specific legal standard that governed its creation — not general principles, but the exact statute, regulation, or professional code that applies.

errors.unsupported_format: Unsupported file format. Please upload PDF, DOCX, or TXT.
errors.audit_failed: Audit processing failed. Please try again.
errors.network_error: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
